lessons: The strongest transferable patterns are:
daemon-owned runtime authority with explicit liveness/readiness/warm-state truth
append-first durable ingest before semantic enrichment
staged representations instead of one blob
progressive disclosure retrieval
explicit rank-preserving hydration from canonical records
cross-surface format variation without truth variation
derived semantic/index layers remaining rebuildable
Current Membrain architecture is strongest in contract vocabulary and transport envelopes, but still weaker in:
authoritative runtime truth outside daemon mode
normal-path evidence hydration
full cross-surface semantic parity
The mature reference confirms Membrain should not add distributed complexity yet; it should first finish truthful runtime authority and hydration.
warnings: `MISSING.md` had an active overlapping exclusive reservation from another agent, so I did not touch it.
The study is landed in bead history now, but if you specifically want the same conclusions duplicated into a doc artifact later, that should wait until the reservation conflict clears.
